case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. GARDA CASH LOGISTICS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVED 12/4/15, FEE: 232.50) SERVED DEC-04-1500, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARDA CASH LOGISTICS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,512.41 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT GARDA CASH LOGISTICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARDA CASH LOGISTICS $2,512.41 PRINCIPAL, $232.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,744.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
